content.label: Branded Work & Campaigns
content.body: Visual assets and narratives that express brand identity with clarity and impact.
content.intro: Visual assets and narratives that express brand identity with clarity and impact — from single spots to sustained campaigns, produced with AI speed and human direction.

content.label: Immersive Mapping
content.body: High-end visuals and immersive mapping for any environment, theme, or surface.
content.intro: High-end visuals and immersive mapping for any environment, theme or surface — stages, buildings, domes, landscapes.

content.label: Artistic Style & Film

content.intro: Character, motion or abstract animation and stylistic film — built to convey story, emotion or concept.

content.label: Digital & Archival Preservation
content.body: Restoration and enhancement of archival photos or footage through advanced AI methods.
content.intro: Restoration and enhancement of archival photos and footage through advanced AI methods — history, kept legible.

interactive.label: Magic Mirror
interactive.body: Real-time AI mirror installation. Touch prompting, custom-trained styles, custom frames — controlled from the Mirror app.
interactive.intro: One system, multiple experiences: a real-time interactive mirror that transforms your audience and places them at the center of the experience.

modes.label: Identity Transformation
modes.body: Guests become alternate versions of themselves in real time.

modes.label: Living Art
modes.body: Participants step inside and animate iconic or branded artworks.

modes.label: Environment Control
modes.body: Movement influences the surrounding visual environment.

modes.label: Game Mode
modes.body: Interactive challenges layered into immersive worlds.

modes.label: Neurofeedback
modes.body: Brain activity drives responsive live visuals.

features.label: TOUCH PROMPTING
features.body: Activate prompts by touching an object of your choice.

features.label: LORA TRAINING
features.body: Artist? Brand? Unique style? We train a LoRA so the mirror keeps your style consistent.

features.label: CUSTOM FRAMES
features.body: A custom frame around the mirror for a more immersive, brand-consistent experience.

features.label: MIRROR APP
features.body: Control prompts and record your experience from the Mirror app.

interactive.body: Generative photo booth for events — branded, styled, instantly shareable.
interactive.intro: Instant transformations, branded take-home moments: a real-time AI portrait experience that turns guests into custom identities — built for festivals, brand activations, conferences and cultural events.

modes.label: Custom Worlds & Characters
modes.body: Visual worlds and AI characters aligned with your identity or campaign narrative.

modes.label: Branded Booth & Interface
modes.body: The booth and its interface carry your brand end to end.

modes.label: Print & Digital Formats
modes.body: Print framing plus digital formats, ready to share.

modes.label: Take-Home Souvenir
modes.body: Every portrait leaves as a branded memory in hand.

interactive.label: Live Visuals
interactive.body: AI-driven VJing and live visuals for stages, performances and immersive spaces.

interactive.body: Living paintings and augmented artworks for museums, galleries and artist collaborations.
